summary_context: Audited and optimized the 'คำนวณค่าแรง' (Wage Calculation) page across 3 files: index.tsx, [id].tsx, and wageService.ts. Found 14 issues across 3 priority levels. Fixed all critical and medium issues: (P1) Extracted AdditionalItemsDrawer and AuditHistoryDrawer into separate components under components/wage/ — [id].tsx reduced from 2,326 to 1,004 lines (-57%). (P2) Wrapped DataGrid columns in useMemo() in both index.tsx and [id].tsx to prevent unnecessary re-renders on every state change. (P3) Added valueGetter to welfareDeductions column to pre-compute 6-field sum once instead of re-calculating in renderCell on every scroll/resize. (P4) Replaced blocking window.confirm() calls in handleApprove/handleMarkPaid with a proper MUI Dialog (confirmAction state), and replaced window.prompt() calls in AdditionalItemsDrawer handleAdd with a validated MUI Form Dialog (addForm state + handleAddSubmit with error handling). Additional fixes: (P7) Removed duplicate error block in index.tsx. (U1) Replaced hardcoded hex color #1976d2 with color='primary' on the create button. Module-level helper functions getStatusLabel and getAuditDetails lifted from inline IIFE to named module-level functions in AuditHistoryDrawer.tsx. All changes verified with TypeScript type-check — 0 errors. Committed as 'optimize calculate page' and pushed to integration branch.
